tasks.subject: [file-explorer-state-persistence] [P1] Extend the feature store with per-cwd persisted entries
tasks.description: In model/file-explorer-store.ts: add scopeKey/expanded/selectedPath/scrollTop state, loadExplorerForCwd hydration, setDirExpanded/setSelectedPath/setScrollTop write-through actions, pruneMissing, co-located localStorage helpers (blob 'dorkos-file-explorer-state', Record<cwd, FileExplorerEntry>, LRU 50 by accessedAt), and persisted showHidden ('dorkos-file-explorer-show-hidden'). Mirror app-store-helpers read/write conventions (try/catch, inline persist after set). Store unit tests per spec §6 including corrupted-JSON fallback and LRU eviction.
tasks.activeForm: Extending the file-explorer store with persistence

tasks.subject: [file-explorer-state-persistence] [P1] Move directory listings to TanStack Query and delete the reducer
tasks.description: Rework model/use-file-explorer.ts: useQueries over root + expanded dirs with keys ['file-explorer','tree',cwd,path,showHidden], new QUERY_TIMING.FILE_TREE_* constants, flattenTree as a pure function of (expanded, queryDataByPath), reload = invalidateQueries on the cwd tree prefix (whole-subtree refresh, spec §2/D4), hydration via loadExplorerForCwd + pruneMissing on listing arrival (spec §3). Delete the tree reducer and dead actions entirely; keep pure helpers in a pure module with ported tests. Retarget use-file-crud.ts optimistic create/rename/delete/move to setQueryData with snapshot rollback + settle invalidation, plus store path fixups for expanded/selected on rename/move/delete.
tasks.activeForm: Migrating tree data to TanStack Query

tasks.subject: [file-explorer-state-persistence] [P2] Wire persisted selection + scroll restore into the UI
tasks.description: Lift selectedPath out of FileExplorer.tsx useState into the store; scroll save (debounced >=250ms trailing + unmount flush) and one-shot restore after first non-empty render in FileTree.tsx for both plain and virtualized paths (spec §4); loading/error rows for expanded dirs from query state with retry; keyboard nav, DnD, context menus, inline create/rename unchanged (spec §5.7). Headline regression test: expand + select, unmount, remount -> state intact and children served from cache with no extra transport call (assert call counts). Update FileExplorer.test.tsx for the new data layer incl. subtree-refresh assertion.
tasks.activeForm: Wiring persisted selection and scroll restore

tasks.subject: [file-explorer-state-persistence] [P2] Changelog fragment + implementation notes
tasks.description: Write changelog/unreleased/<timestamp-id>-file-explorer-state-persistence.md in writing-for-humans voice (describe what the user gets: the file tree remembers where you were). Write specs/file-explorer-state-persistence/04-implementation.md summarizing what shipped vs spec, deviations, and follow-ups deferred per D8. Run pnpm verify.
